---
name: 🚀 Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement for IRIS
title: "[FEATURE] <Short, descriptive title>"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## 🙋 Problem Statement
Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.
*Example: "I struggle to organize my generated PDFs when running multiple searches in parallel."*

## 💡 Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen and how you visualize this feature.
*Explain the ideal workflow, new UI components, or backend changes.*

## 🎨 Mockups / Visuals (If applicable)
Add any sketches, screenshots, or design ideas that could help us visualize the feature.
*(Tip: Feel free to suggest specific color palettes or layout concepts that fit the IRIS modern design system!)*

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered.

## ➕ Additional Context
Add any other context or links about the feature request here (e.g. references to similar features in other tools, research or API documentation).
